prompt: We are a mid-size European energy company with 200 employees and €50M annual turnover, operating electricity distribution networks in Germany. Do we fall under the NIS2 Directive? If so, as what type of entity, and what are our key obligations?
assertions: Correctly classifies the energy company as an Essential Entity (EE) under NIS2 Annex I (energy sector, electricity sub-sector)
Confirms the entity meets size thresholds (≥50 employees OR ≥€10M turnover) making it automatically in scope
Explains Art. 20 governance obligation: management body approval, training, and potential personal liability
Lists all 10 Art. 21 cybersecurity risk management measures or explicitly covers the key ones (incident handling, BCP, supply chain, MFA, cryptography)
States Art. 23 incident reporting timelines: 24-hour early warning, 72-hour notification, 1-month final report to CSIRT/competent authority
